## Changes

### [#196](https://github.com/velocitycareerlabs/WalletAndroid/pull/196) Implement SDK error taxonomy
- add the Kotlin SDK error taxonomy contract, classifying errors by validation phase (link validation, client request fetch, DID resolution, registration check, request validation, request authorization)
- add `sourceErrorCode`, `validationPhase`, `requestDid`, `requestUri`, and `requestKind` to `VCLError`
- add `Taxonomy` and `Legacy` compatibility modes via `errorCodeCompatibilityMode` on `VCLInitializationDescriptor` (default `Taxonomy`)

### [#195](https://github.com/velocitycareerlabs/WalletAndroid/pull/195) Add error taxonomy baseline
- add backward-compatibility baseline coverage for the taxonomy work

### [#192](https://github.com/velocitycareerlabs/WalletAndroid/pull/192) Add native error diagnostics
- capture native cause and stack-frame diagnostics on `VCLError`

### [#198](https://github.com/velocitycareerlabs/WalletAndroid/pull/198) Taxonomy review fixes
- align request JWT decoding with the taxonomy and harden the legacy compatibility mapping

## Backward incompatibilities
- By default the SDK now returns the new taxonomy error codes instead of the previous codes, and populates validation-phase and request context on `VCLError`. Set `errorCodeCompatibilityMode = VCLErrorCodeCompatibilityMode.Legacy` during initialization to preserve the previous error codes.
- Empty, missing, or malformed request JWTs are now classified as `issuer_request_invalid` / `verifier_request_invalid` during request validation, rather than surfacing later as DID resolution or public-JWK lookup failures.
